title: Astral Pipes is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Astral Pipes is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes:
Astral Pipes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
